name: pi-monitor-plugin
description_en: Background, monitor, loop, and schedule jobs for the pi coding agent, with idle-aware session notifications. Ships a skill that watches GitHub for PRs awaiting your review and notifies your session.
description_zh: Pi 编码代理的后台监控、循环和定时任务，具有空闲感知的会话通知。附带一个技能，用于监视 GitHub 上等待您审查的 PR 并通知您的会话
